title: PMM cards conditional rendering — distinguish 'not registered' from 'exporter unhealthy'

scope.ui: Drawer PMM section adds two conditional branches: 'not-registered' (instance never told to PMM) and 'exporter-unhealthy' (marked registered but PMM returns no series). Metrics cards still render when any value arrives.
scope.noServerChanges: Q1 resolved by using the existing instance.pmmRegistered flag (already on DbInstanceResponse). No PMM service-list lookup endpoint added — keeps the change cheap and avoids the PMM Management API client that Option B would require.
scope.deferred: Option B (auto-register endpoint + button) deferred. The 'Register in PMM' button intentionally not added; operators still register from the PMM side via pmm-admin add.

decisions.Q1: Use existing pmmRegistered flag instead of PMM service-list probe — no new server endpoint required, no new PMM API client.
decisions.Q2: Out of scope (only relevant for Option B).

verification.test: pass (8/8 new helper unit tests + 247 existing pass)
